title: hygrophila balsamica var. thymus
intro: Hygrophila balsamica var. thymus, also known as Indian pennywort, is a type of aquatic plant native to tropical regions. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Indian pennywort are said to include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cognitive function, and promoting healthy digestion. Indian pennywort can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or extract, and is often used in traditional Indian medicine to support overall well-being.
